title: Tiger said he was looking at phone before crash
content: Tiger Woods told authorities that he was looking down at his phone and changing the radio station before his rollover crash last week in Florida, according to a probable cause affidavit.

content: Ohio State coach Ryan Day drew parallels between the evolving state of college football and when dinosaurs faced their extinction-level event. "Either adapt or you die," he said.

title: 'Beginning of brutality akin to Manipur': Oppn slams BJP, JDU after woman molested in Bihar
content: A disturbing video from Bihar's Nalanda district, showing a mob assaulting a woman, has sparked outrage. Opposition leaders decried the incident as a "shameful" breakdown of law and order, drawing parallels to the Manipur violence. Police have arrested two individuals, with efforts ongoing to apprehend others involved in the alleged gang rape attempt and public humiliation.

title: Cooper Connolly dream debut powers Punjab Kings to three wickets win over Gujarat Titans
content: Debutant Cooper Connolly starred with a match-winning unbeaten 72, guiding Punjab Kings to a thrilling three-wicket victory over Gujarat Titans. Chasing 163, Connolly's composed knock, supported by Prabhsimran Singh's aggressive start, ensured PBKS crossed the finish line with five balls to spare. Vijaykumar Vyshak's three wickets earlier restricted GT.

title: Missiles overhead, mines below: How an Indian LPG tanker survived the Hormuz blockade
content: The Indian-flagged LPG tanker Pine Gas faced a nearly three-week delay passing through the Strait of Hormuz after Iran began selective passage.  The vessel, carrying 45,000 metric tons of LPG, was eventually rerouted via a less-used channel north of Larak Island, guided by the Indian Navy and escorted by warships.

title: Oracle layoffs: Employees in India, US, & other regions receive email at 6am
content: Oracle has started laying off employees across its global offices, with workers receiving termination emails at 6AM from "Oracle Leadership" informing them their roles had been eliminated. Teams like RHS, SVOS, and NetSuite IDC were among the first hit. The job cuts could hit 20,000 to 30,000 people—roughly 18% of Oracle's workforce—as the company looks to free up cash for its AI data centre push.

title: 'Could have got Prasidh earlier': Gill admits after GT's loss to PBKS
content: "I could have got Prasidh on earlier, but we were in the game until the end, there will always be ifs and buts. But he came at the right time, took wickets and kept us in the game until the 17th and 18th over," Gill said after the match.

title: Starting April 1, USCIS alert says that the immigration authority will reject forms
content: USCIS will only accept the 02/27/26 edition of Form I-129 for H-1B and other visa applications starting April 1, 2026. The updated form requires employers to detail educational requirements and experience, aligning with the Department of Labor's wage level assignments for the new wage-weighted lottery system.

title: Malayalam director Ranjith arrested in attempted sexual assault case
content: Noted Malayalam filmmaker Ranjith was taken into custody on Tuesday evening in connection with an attempted sexual assault case, police officials said.

title: Chaos at Gaddafi Stadium: PSL ground staff slip, fall as covers fly in Lahore—Watch
content: Videos of the incident later circulated on social media, showing the staff struggling to manage the covers in the rain and wind. At one point, two members fell while trying to stop the covers from being lifted.

title: Iran threatens Meta, Google, Apple and other US tech giants, calls them legitimate targets
content: Iran's Revolutionary Guard has declared major US tech firms, including Meta, Google, and Apple, as legitimate targets, demanding their regional offices evacuate. This escalation follows alleged Israeli-US intelligence-backed strikes that Iran claims killed its leadership and officials. The IRGC stated these companies are responsible for high-tech warfare, vowing to retaliate if further Iranian leaders are assassinated.

title: Tiger Woods’ alleged insult to Vanessa Trump after DUI sparks fallout
content: Tiger Woods’ recent DUI arrest has created serious tension with Vanessa Trump. What began as support turned into concern over safety and trust. Sources told Daily Mail that Vanessa is frustrated and may walk away if things do not change. While Woods has apologized, questions remain about his future, both in his relationship and his planned golf comeback.

title: Brittany Mahomes reacts to Randi’s emotional post on family bond
content: Brittany Mahomes’ induction into the University of Texas at Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame highlights her own athletic journey, separate from her public life today. A former collegiate standout who briefly played professionally in Iceland, she remains connected to her roots. Her heartfelt speech and the support from Randi Mahomes reflect both personal pride and a continued commitment to uplifting women’s sports.

title: Fact check: Did Drew ‘Druski’ Desbordes, Erika Kirk respond to skit?
content: Drew “Druski” Desbordes’ viral skit led to rumors of an online clash with Erika Kirk, but no real interaction happened. A fake screenshot showing comments between them spread on X, but it was proven false. No cease-and-desist was sent, and neither Druski nor Erika Kirk has responded publicly to each other.

title: Justin Jefferson’s Vikings linked to $47 m Lions center move
content: The Minnesota Vikings are linked to Detroit Lions center Graham Glasgow in 2026 free agency following Ryan Kelly’s retirement. Glasgow is a veteran with extensive experience. He could fill the void left by Kelly. He could offer a proven presence despite his age. He may to have compete with current Vikings centers Blake Brandel and Michael Jurgens.

title: Patriots QB Drake Maye shaves head, stuns fans with his new look for a wholesome reason
content: New England Patriots quarterback Drake Maye debuted a buzz cut at the "Saving by Shaving" event, where he shaved his head for pediatric cancer research. His wife initiated the shave, and the event, which raised over $4.15 million for Boston Children's Hospital, highlighted Maye's commitment to the community and his new nonprofit, the MayeDay Family Foundation.

title: Collared tiger killed to protect 'secret' opium farm in MP
content: Illegal opium cultivators killed a rewilded, radio-collared tiger in Madhya Pradesh to deter forest patrols from discovering their illicit farms. The big cat's movements, tracked by its collar, brought officials too close, prompting the deadly act. The tiger was poisoned using a bull, and its collar was destroyed to hide evidence.

title: Rhea Kapoor shares glimpse of Sonam-Anand’s baby boy, celebs react
content: After Sonam Kapoor and Anand Ahuja announced the arrival of their second child, a baby boy, it was Rhea Kapoor who set social media abuzz by sharing an adorable photo of the newborn. Rhea took to social media to share the baby boy’s first glimpse, and the internet couldn’t keep calm. The picture quickly went viral, with fans and celebrities alike gushing over the little one.

title: Wd, no-ball, wd: Arshdeep joins unwanted list with 11-ball over in IPL vs GT
content: Arshdeep’s final over of the innings included four wides and a no ball, conceding 12 runs. He finished with figures of 0 for 42 in his four overs.

title: Mojtaba Khamenei in Iran but avoiding public appearance for 'understandable reasons,' says Russia
content: Iran's newly appointed Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, is reportedly in the country but has avoided public appearances following his father's death and the ongoing conflict. Russia's ambassador confirmed his presence, while US President Trump questioned Iran's leadership stability, suggesting Mojtaba is either dead or severely injured.

content: The selloff by foreign institutional investors (FIIs) has been particularly pronounced. Rupee has seen its worst financial year in over 14 years, breaching the 95 per dollar mark in trade on the last trading day (March 30) of the fiscal year.

title: Ronaldo makes move for Casemiro as Messi Inter Miami sets up rivalry talk: Report
content: Cristiano Ronaldo is trying to bring Casemiro to Al-Nassr, while Lionel Messi’s Inter Miami also wants him. Money could decide the move. Casemiro likes Miami but may earn more in Saudi Arabia. At the same time, Zico has questioned Neymar’s professionalism, saying he has great talent but has not used it well in recent years.

title: Identity on trial: Why India's new transgender law is facing backlash
content: India's new Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Act, 2026, has sparked widespread protests by removing self-identification rights. Critics argue the law replaces individual autonomy with mandatory medical certification, contradicting previous legal precedents and the Supreme Court's NALSA judgment. Activists fear this regressive move will hinder access to essential rights and services for the transgender community.

title: Naseem Shah row: PCB warns players of PKR 1 crore fine over social media posts
content: ​​As per the directive, centrally contracted players must take approval from the PCB’s media department before posting on social media.

title: Raja Shivaji first look teaser out: Riteish film promises a visual spectacle
content: The highly anticipated first look teaser for 'Raja Shivaji' has officially dropped, following a successful theatrical preview. This ambitious Marathi film, directed by and starring Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh, promises a pan-India spectacle depicting Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj's legacy. Featuring a stellar ensemble cast including Sanjay Dutt and Abhishek Bachchan, the movie boasts grand visuals, intense action, and music by Ajay-Atul.

title: 'No plan B, C or D': FIFA asserts Iran will play World Cup in US
content: "Iran will be at the World Cup... That's why we're here. We're delighted because they're a very, very strong team, I'm very happy," Infantino said at half-time during Iran’s friendly against Costa Rica in Turkey.

title: NBC apologises after showing wrong Tiger Woods crash footage during live coverage
content: Tiger Woods faces renewed scrutiny after a high-speed crash in Florida led to his arrest on DUI-related charges. NBC compounded attention by mistakenly airing footage from his 2021 accident, prompting an on-air apology. While alcohol was ruled out, Woods showed signs of impairment. The incident has reignited discussions of his past crashes and legal troubles, drawing public and celebrity commentary.

title: Vikrant Massey flags restaurant’s illegal service charge through SM post
content: Vikrant Massey called out a restaurant on Instagram for illegal service charge, sharing a bill photo tagging authorities. Netizens praised him, but he deleted the post soon after. title: 'Trump doesn't bluff': Pentagon chief warns Iran, says US wants deal but 'prepared to bomb'
content: Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth declared upcoming days "decisive" in the Middle East conflict, warning Iran to "cut a deal" as President Trump "doesn’t bluff."  He emphasized shifting power dynamics and US options, urging Tehran to relinquish ambitions and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.  Escalation continues with recent attacks impacting oil prices.

title: Murder convict MP BJP corporator Kallu Kushwaha shot dead in Datia
content: A BJP corporator, Kallu Kushwaha, was shot dead in broad daylight in Datia, sparking panic and raising law and order concerns. The victim, who had a criminal past and recently served a life sentence, was attacked by unidentified assailants. Police are investigating personal enmity and have rounded up suspects, examining CCTV footage.

title: Sabalenka excels, Sinner back on track and more takeaways from Indian Wells and Miami Open
content: the "sunshine double" and tennis' version of March Madness are elusive feats . just four women and seven men had achieved back-to-back victory in singles play . despite everything mentioned above, the Sunshine Double was achieved not just once over the weekend .

title: What's next for Duke, Tennessee after Elite Eight: Recruits, transfer portal, more
content: the 2026 men's NCAA tournament has featured its fair share of heartbreaking losses . but what's next for teams that didn't make it past the second weekend? what about for storied programs that did not reach the regionals?

title: 2026 rankings: Profiling the top 35 QBs
content: the 2024 NFL MVP has finished in the top 10 in passing TDs six seasons in a row and remains a major threat with his legs . despite seeing less passing volume the past two seasons (14th or lower in pass attempts both years), he has finished second among quarterbacks in fantasy points . his 21.4 fantasy points per game in 2025 was actually his lowest since 2019 .

title: Previewing the McDonald's All American boys' game: Stokes vs. Branch, more to watch
content: the McDonald's All American boys' game annually brings together the nation's top prospects in the senior high school class . all 24 players in this year's game are ranked inside the ESPN 100 -- including the top seven players in the class, headlined by no. 1 Tyran Stokes and no. 2 Jordan Smith .

title: World Cup playoffs: Predicting who will claim the final six places
content: the 2026 FIFA men's world cup kicks off on June 11 . the final qualified teams will be confirmed Tuesday . four european nations and winners of the two intercontinental playoff finals sealing their spot in the Canada, Mexico and the united states this summer .

title: UConn odds-on title favorite, 1-seeds all that remain in women's tournament
content: the women's college basketball tournament will be with -160 odds . it will be its longest since the calendar flipped to 2026 . in January, Geno Auriemma's squad was -190 to win the title . UCLA has fallen to the bottom of the odds board at +600 .

title: Heavyweight madness: Which big fella would win a 16-man tournament?
content: the men's and women's basketball tournaments haven't stopped us from creating our own hypothetical tournaments for the past few years . the big fellas will take center stage in this year's bracket . former uFC and PFL heavyweight champ Alex Pereira will move up to MMA's premier weight class on may 14 .

title: Week 8 Top 25 and how to watch
content: a big shakeup in this week's top ten . Nebraska, Alabama, Arkansas, Florida, Tennessee and UCLA all shuffling places . the Crimson Tide received a first-place vote in advance of their series against the team that received the most votes, Texas .

title: Patriots' Drake Maye shaves hair at charity event for Boston Children's Hospital
content: the new England Patriots quarterback shaved his head to raise money for charity . the 23-year-old was a headline guest at the 13th annual "Saving by Shaving" event . he announced the formation of his own charitable organization .

title: MMA divisional rankings: Grasso, Pyfer elevate their standing in knockout performances
content: the main event pitted two-time former middleweight champion Israel Adesanya against rising Joe Pyfer . he scored a second-round knockout for his fourth straight victory . former women's flyweight champion Alexa Grasso finished fellow top-10 fighter Maycee Barber in the first round .

title: Aw Crap! Trump’s image goes down the toilet
content: a 10-foot golden toilet commode has appeared on the national mall . it is, according to its snarky creators, a tribute to Trump’s priorities . the sculpture satirizes the realtor-turned-President’s much-discussed White House renovations .

title: Trump taunts world saying go get oil from inflamed Iran — or buy from America
content: a pair of incendiary social media posts on tuesday mocked allies and partners . he told allies to 'go get your own oil' from an inflamed Gulf region or buy american energy . they have declined to support what even domestic critics see as Washington’s reckless war that is torching the global economy .

title: Early Men's Final Four preview: Arizona-Michigan, UConn-Illinois predictions

title: TG bill becomes law; uncertainty over 32K self-identified TG certificates
content: amendments remove provisions in the 2019 law that allowed "self-perceived gender identity" to be the basis for self-determination and identification . a medical board headed by the chief medical officer has been introduced . the district magistrate will issue a certificate of transgender identity .
